title: I replaced my X analytics dashboard for a daily "what to do next" brief
abstract: Replace your boring analytics with a daily dose of what-to-do-next magic! **Show HN: I replaced my X analytics dashboard for a daily "what to do next" brief** keeps you laughing and productive!
abstract_zh: 伙计们！我最近把那个烦人的X analytics dashboard换成了个叫**Show HN: I replaced my X analytics dashboard for a daily "what to do next" brief**的新玩意儿。写周报时，再也不用挖空心思找数据了；调Bug时，直接获得定制化建议，效率嗖嗖地提上去！这工具简直帮我从日常琐碎中解放出来，简直是现代数据
